Description.Name: Knife Fighter
Description.Details:
You became a commander after years as a [[DM.BaseDescriptionDefs[Pafftek_Lore_KnifeFighter], gang knife combatant]].  The escape from the gangs did however come with its own price.  Once you made it into a mercenary outfit of disripute, you quickly got to work learning the ins and outs of combat in a big clompy battlemech.  However your experience as a knife fighter in the gangs actually served you well in melee combat.  A bad mission caused you to separate from that company of disripute as it disentigrated.   You joined up with Raju after bouncing from port to port looking for work. 

 [[DM.BaseDescriptionDefs[Pafftek_Lore_WARNINGSKILL],WARNING READ THIS!]]

OptionDescription: You became a commander after years as a gang knife combatant.
Intro: You became a commander after years as a melee gang knife combatant.
BioDescription: You became a commander after years as a gang knife combatant.
